stemHtml: The geometric pitch of a propeller is the _____ a propeller would advance in _____, at _____.

options.a: theoretical distance, one revolution, zero blade angle of attack.
options.b: distance, a half revolution, zero blade angle of attack.
options.c: theoretical distance, a half revolution, higher blade angle of attack.
options.d: theoretical distance, one revolution, maximum blade angle of attack.
